HEllo I cannot reproduce this with fresh sources, please make sure you 
have the very latest configuration available, also if this remains a 
problem let me know then I can reopen the ticket; in that case I want to 
know what specific buildoptions you use, what cvsup mirror you use etc. 
Thanks.
